title: Rebith of Tech Magic Origins
description: This Modpack offers you a new game experience full of adventure, fighting and creativity.
body:
# Descripition

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/33BUuNUa/images/b2f6115992c1602fb51ee829c038a28d46cc8693.png)

This mod pack caters to fans of adventure, action, and engineering in the world of Minecraft. Prepare for a new and thrilling gaming experience filled with research opportunities, intense battles, and limitless creativity. 

- Delve into new dungeons packed with traps, treasures, and ferocious beasts.

- Take on formidable opponents of varying levels of difficulty using a diverse range of weapons, armor, and magic. Some of the modifications that introduce fresh adversaries and capabilities include Born in Chaos and Ultris: Boss Expansion.

- Employ the Create mod to produce diverse mechanisms and machines, thereby facilitating automation of multiple processes. 

- Use Pufferfish's Skills mods to improve your skills and stats, increasing your level by choosing specializations.

- Enhance your Minecraft gameplay by incorporating mods like Terralith, Tectonic, and Continents to add new features and improve world generation. These mods offer a diverse range of biomes, new blocks and objects, and a more realistic atmosphere, making your gaming experiencemore captivating and exciting. 

Additionally, you'll encounter new enemies to battle, more opportunities to create and build, and plenty of opportunities to improve your skills. This modpack is great for adventure, action, and technology enthusiasts. We hope you enjoy it! 😊

# Mod Copyright Atribution

# Thanks to the authors 
#### who allowed me to use mod in my modpack

- FPS boost - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/better-fps
